title: Canonical Version Bumped Event
description: Emitted ONLY by the Spec Corpus Agent (single-write-owner of canonical contracts) after a ratification_decision authorizes promoting an artifact to a new canonical version. Records the version transition + its Promotion Ledger entry. CI's single-writer gate rejects this event_type from any other source.

promotion_ledger_entry.description: Append-only Promotion Ledger entry recording the bump

ratification_event_id.description: event_id of the ratification_decision that authorized this bump

superseded_artifacts.description: Prior-version files now Superseded (preserved for traceability, not deleted)

registry_bump.description: Whether the Artifact Registry version also bumped (false for reconciliation/meta entries that absorb without bump)
